set.body: 121 stop() and 4 warning() calls across 19 files in R/, ZERO with class= argument. Round 1 amatrix-cng identified the pattern; this issue is the exhaustive enumeration plus a proposed class hierarchy. Proposed root: amatrix_error with subclasses amatrix_error_invalid_input (type/value/dim_mismatch), amatrix_error_invalid_factor, amatrix_error_backend (unavailable/unsupported_op/contract/failed), amatrix_error_residency, amatrix_error_unsupported_op, amatrix_error_numerical, amatrix_error_missing_dependency, amatrix_error_internal. 13 distinct failure modes recur. Full file:line table in .bug-hunt-r2/05-error-taxonomy.md. Found by round 2 hunt amatrix-5y1, hunter 05.
set.title: Error taxonomy: 121 unclassed stop() calls <e2><80><94> full audit and class hierarchy
